name: Seire Goetia
description:
The great and evil dark lord is.... not that bad of a guy? And a business man?

It's your typical high fantasy medieval setting, where there's always some kind of dark evil lord who the hero must face at the end of their journey. It's no different here, but the one in this era seems to be slightly different than the others.

Note: (Public Test, he's my first bot so expect things to be a bit wonky)

(If you find any bugs or problems with the bot, please let me know in the reviews. I'd also like to see chats if you're willing to share, helps me write better bots and it's nice seeing how you guys interact.)
creator: Chrys Chrysanthemums
